# --- Secrets: never commit these ---
.env
.env.*
!.env.example
!.env.production.example
server/.env
server/.env.*
!server/.env.example
!server/.env.production.example
server/secrets/
*.p8

# --- Dependencies ---
node_modules/
server/node_modules/

# --- Build output (regenerated by `npm run build` / Docker build) ---
dist/
server/dist/

# --- Logs / OS / editor cruft ---
*.log
npm-debug.log*
.DS_Store
.vscode/
.idea/
